title: tetradiclis tenella
intro: Tetradiclis tenella, also known as the desert indigo plant, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Myoporaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe wounds, reduce swelling, and prevent infection. The health benefits of Tetradiclis tenella include its ability to aid in the healing of cuts and scrapes, reduce fever, and provide relief from pain and discomfort. Herbal preparations of Tetradiclis tenella can be made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water to create a tea, or by applying a topical solution to the affected area.
